intro: Forget birth charts — this is astrology for the vibes only. Answer 6 playful questions to find your relationship element: Fire, Earth, Air, or Water. Matching elements? Extra fun.

options.label: A talk so good we forget to order
Songs and 'this made me think of you'

questions.text: In a crisis, you're the one who…

options.label: Acts before anyone finishes the sentence
Has water, cash, and a plan

fire.title: Fire
fire.description: Bold, warm, first on the dance floor. You love loudly and decide fast — your partner never wonders how you feel about them.
fire.tip: Your heat is magnetic. Just leave a little room for a slower element to catch up — not everyone runs at your tempo.

earth.title: Earth
earth.description: Steady, sensory, the planner. You love through reliability — the charged phone, the packed snacks, the detail they mentioned once and you remembered.
earth.tip: Your consistency is deeply romantic (really). Say the feeling out loud sometimes too — they can't always read it in the logistics.

air.title: Air
air.description: Curious, chatty, three ideas at once. You love through conversation — the 2am talks are the relationship, as far as you're concerned.
air.tip: Words are your love language. Pair them with presence — sometimes they just want you in the room, not a new angle.

water.title: Water
water.description: Deep, intuitive, a little psychic. You love through attunement — you can feel their mood from across the world.
water.tip: Your empathy is a superpower. Protect it — you're allowed to name your own feelings, not just sense everyone else's.
